channel.title: Mystic Skills :: Tuan Dat | Cloud & Backend Developer
channel.description: 1. Hugo Commands 1.1 hugo build 1.2 hugo server -D 2. Git Commands 2.1 Check repository status git status 2.2 List local branches git branch 2.3 List all branches (local + remote)

item.title: Bí Thuật
